text.title: Nomad Async Ops Stack Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Nomad Async Ops Stack end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: inventory-tools
step.action: List primary tools; mark offline-capable yes/no.

step.name: set-payment-window
step.action: Pick 30-min daily window in operator-local time.

step.name: emit-spec
step.action: Write nomad-async-ops-stack.json; assign owner; set review date.
